description.content: Lookup breaches affecting an email address.

Returns all breaches for the supplied email address. Requires a valid `hibp-api-key`
and a descriptive `user-agent` header.

query.description: When true (default) only breach names are returned. Set false for full breach objects.
Filter results to breaches against the supplied domain.
When true (default), unverified breaches are included in results.

response.name: One or more breaches were found.

info.name: Have I Been Pwned API v3

description.content:
The Have I Been Pwned (HIBP) API allows the list of pwned accounts (email addresses, domains,
passwords, and stealer log entries) to be quickly searched via REST. Authenticated endpoints
require an `hibp-api-key` header. All requests must send a `user-agent` header that accurately
identifies the consuming application. Subscriptions range from Pwned 1 to Pwned 5.


Contact Support:
 Name: Have I Been Pwned
